data.title: Planet Lunch News
A whale withdrew 1,500 BTC from OKX in the past 20 hours, equivalent to about $128 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale withdrew 1,500 BTC (worth approximately US$128 million) from OKX in the past 20 hours.

data.title: Bitcoin's 14-year return rate is 72,000 times, far exceeding the S&P 500's 306% and gold's 116%.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin has performed well in all time periods, outperforming the S&P 500 index every year for the past 14 years. During this period, Bitcoin achieved a return rate of approximately 72,000, far exceeding the 116% return rate of gold and the 306% return rate of the S&P 500 index. In a shorter period of time, Bitcoin's return rate in the past two years was 173%, further consolidating its dominance over traditional investment assets such as gold and the S&P 500 index. (The Defiant)

data.title: Bitcoin's Long-Term Performance Surpasses Traditional Assets
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin has consistently outperformed traditional investment assets over various time periods. Over the past 14 years, Bitcoin has achieved a remarkable return rate of approximately 7,200,000%, significantly surpassing the returns of gold at 116% and the S&P 500 index at 306%. In shorter time frames, Bitcoin's return rate over the past two years stands at 173%, further solidifying its dominance over conventional assets like gold and the S&P 500 index.

data.title: Trump Meets with El Salvador’s President Bukele to Discuss Trade and Immigration, No Bitcoin Mention
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News President Trump and Salvadoran President Bukele, who supports Bitcoin, discussed trade and immigration issues in a meeting on Monday. Bitcoin was not mentioned in the meeting.

data.title: DARK's market value briefly exceeded 20 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Odaily Planet Daily News According to the market, DARK's market value briefly exceeded 20 million US dollars, and is now reported at 0.01981 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of more than 190%. DARK is an experimental network based on a trusted execution environment (TEE) designed to support the infinitely scalable MCP world.

data.title: Canada to Launch 'World First' Spot Solana ETFs With Staking This Week: Balchunas
data.description:
Canada has outpaced the U. S. with the launch of staking-enabled spot Solana ETFs as interest globally continues to build.
source: https://decrypt.co/314795/canada-launch-spot-solana-etfs-staking

data.title: Analysis: Some Ethereum inverse ETFs have risen sharply, and shorting ETH may become a hot trading spot this year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Market data shows that ETH has fallen nearly 51% from its January high, causing shorting ETH to become a hot trading spot in 2025, such as: 
1. The ProShares 2x Ethereum Inverse ETF (ETHD) listed on the New York Stock Exchange has risen 247% so far this year, making it the best performing ETF in the US market; 
2. The T-REX 2X Inverse Ethereum Inverse ETF has a return rate of about 220% since the beginning of the year. 
Analysts believe that 2025 may be cruel for ETH bulls because leveraged shorts are crushing them. (News.bitcoin)

data.title: Binance will perform wallet maintenance on BNB Smart Chain (BEP20)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will perform wallet maintenance on BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) at 14:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 17, 2025. To support this maintenance, Binance will suspend the recharge and withdrawal services of BNB Smart Chain (BEP20) at 13:55 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 17, 2025. The maintenance is expected to take 1 hour, and the recharge and withdrawal services will be automatically resumed after the maintenance is completed.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao Refutes Allegations of Ties to Federal Reserve
data.description:
Binance's founder, Changpeng Zhao, refutes claims of U. S. Federal Reserve connections during an X Spaces discussion.
source: https://coincu.com/332218-changpeng-zhao-denies-federal-reserve-ties
